arts.ttl: ‘Speaks too much’ – Real Madrid boss Ancelotti hits back at La Liga president Javier Tebas
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Tuesday hit back at La Liga president Javier Tebas. This comes after the Spanish patron, not for the first time this season,…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid furious with Barcelona and Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are furious that LaLiga has scheduled their game against Villarreal on matchday 28 for 6:30 p.m. local time (12:30 p.m. ET) on Saturday, March 15, giving them what they feel is a considerable disadvantage in the title race in Spain. Due to LaLiga’s scheduling, Ancelotti’s team will head to Villarreal with only two days of rest after the grueling European match, and on top of that, they’ll play at 6:30 p.m.

arts.ttl: Why Kylian Mbappé missed Real Madrid training on Tuesday
arts.sum: An explanation for the absence of Kylian Mbappé from Real Madrid training on Tuesday has been forthcoming online. For those who may have missed it, frontman Mbappé set alarm bells…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to receive £42m Bayern Munich transfer offer for out-of-favour attacker?
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich are reportedly willing to table a €50m (£41.5m) bid to lure Arda Guler away from Real Madrid this summer.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti says Mbappé will be available to play in Copa semifinal despite a tooth problem
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé missed practice because of a tooth problem but will be available to play for Real Madrid in the Copa del Rey semifinal against Real Sociedad, coach Carlo Ancelotti said Tuesday. Madrid, seeking its second Copa final in three seasons, will play the first leg of the semifinals at Sociedad on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: The surprise team that has won the Copa del Rey more than Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barça host Atlético Madrid in the first leg of the semifinals of the 2024/25 Copa del Rey on Tuesday (February 25) and are going in search of a record-extending 32nd triumph in the Spanish cup. It’s probably not too controversial to suggest Real Madrid and Barcelona are Spain two biggest soccer clubs, based on a number of different metrics, from trophies won, to national and global fanbase, to annual revenue and overall valuation .

arts.ttl: Louis Vuitton to Sign Real Madrid Deal
arts.sum: French luxury giant Louis Vuitton is reportedly set to replace Italian fashion house Zegna as Real Madrid's official fashion partner beginning next season, according to @rodritaa10 from Relevo Deportes.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Tebas 'talks about Madrid too much'
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti hit back at Javier Tebas on Tuesday, saying the LaLiga president "talks about Real Madrid too much" and showed a "lack of respect."

Real Madrid forward Kylian Mbappé has undergone an operation on a tooth which could see him miss out on his side’s Copa del Rey semi-final game against Real Sociedad on Wednesday. Carlo Ancelotti also explained in his pre-game press conference that Fede Valverde and Thibaut Courtois will also miss out on the game in San Sebastián, although there are no injury concerns with either.

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone's Atletico Madrid record vs Barcelona and Real Madrid
arts.sum: While they don’t dominate the headlines in Spain like Barcelona or Real Madrid, Atlético Madrid are quietly enjoying an excellent campaign. As we enter the business end of...
